pom.xml.general_idea: Update the groupId to reflect a new namespace or author identity.
Refine the project description to be more specific about CLI functionality and data sources.
pom.xml.before: <description>Tool to retrieve CVE/CPE data from NIST's NVD repository and CWE data maintained by MITRE</description>
pom.xml.after: <description>A CLI tool to fetch CVE and CPE data (including match criteria) from NIST's NVD API, along with CWE data from MITRE.</description>

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 features if the source/target version remains at 17 while using JDK 21 APIs or language features.
